info.title: Google Gemini Generate Content API
info.description: Google Gemini API for content generation (text, image, audio) based on official documentation.

post.summary: Generate content using the specified Gemini model

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The name of the model to use, format: models/{model}

x-doc.desc_en: Which Gemini model to run, given in the path as `models/{model}`.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用使用的 Gemini 模型,在路径中以 `models/{model}` 形式给出。

x-doc.desc_en: Invoke a Gemini model to generate content from a multi-turn conversation. Drive the output with tools, safety settings, a system instruction, and generation parameters, and optionally reuse previously cached context.
x-doc.description_zh: 调用指定 Gemini 模型,基于多轮对话生成内容。可通过工具、安全设置、系统指令与生成参数控制输出,并可选择复用此前缓存的上下文。
x-doc.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回模型生成的候选内容列表。
x-doc.errors_source: spec 以 default 响应承载错误体(ErrorResponse),未声明具体 HTTP 状态码

x-doc.desc_en: The ordered conversation turns sent to the model; each turn carries its content parts and the role that produced them. This is the primary input the model responds to.
x-doc.title_zh: 发送给模型的有序对话轮次,每一轮携带其内容片段以及产生它的角色。这是模型据以应答的主要输入。

tools.description: Optional tools the model can use

x-doc.desc_en: Tools the model is allowed to call during generation, enabling capabilities such as function calling.
x-doc.title_zh: 允许模型在生成过程中调用的工具,用于开启函数调用等能力。

x-doc.desc_en: Configuration that governs how the model selects and invokes the provided tools.
x-doc.title_zh: 约束模型如何选择并调用上述工具的配置。

x-doc.desc_en: Per-request safety controls that adjust how generated content is filtered against harm categories.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次请求的安全控制项,用于调整生成内容针对各类风险类别的过滤策略。

x-doc.desc_en: A top-level instruction that sets the model's persona, rules, or task framing, applied across the whole conversation.
x-doc.title_zh: 顶层系统指令,用于设定模型的人设、规则或任务框架,对整段对话统一生效。

x-doc.desc_en: Parameters that shape the generation itself, such as sampling and output-length controls.
x-doc.title_zh: 塑造本次生成过程的参数,例如采样与输出长度等控制项。

x-doc.desc_en:
Reference to previously cached context to reuse, avoiding resending large shared content on each call.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该缓存 ID 的获取接口与生效条件,待研发确认。]
x-doc.title_zh:
指向此前已缓存上下文的引用,可复用以避免每次调用都重传大体量的共享内容。
[⚠️批注:源码未声明该缓存 ID 的获取接口与生效条件,待研发确认。]

x-doc.desc_en: The text payload of a part, used when the part carries written content.
x-doc.title_zh: 片段的文本内容,当该片段承载文字时使用。

x-doc.desc_en: The pieces that make up one conversation turn. A part is either a text segment or inline binary data (such as an image), letting a single turn mix modalities.
x-doc.title_zh: 构成一个对话轮次的若干片段。每个片段要么是一段文本,要么是内联的二进制数据(如图像),从而让单轮内容可以混合多种模态。

x-doc.desc_en: Who authored this turn, distinguishing system guidance, end-user input, and prior model output so the model reads the dialogue in the right voice.
x-doc.title_zh: 该轮内容的作者身份,用于区分系统引导、终端用户输入与模型既往输出,使模型以正确的视角解读对话。

x-doc.desc_en: The content the model generated; each candidate is one self-contained response made up of content parts and its role.
x-doc.title_zh: 模型生成的内容;每个候选是一份自包含的应答,由内容片段及其角色组成。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的数字错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
x-doc.title_zh: 对出错原因的可读说明。

x-doc.desc_en: Symbolic status string for the error, suitable for programmatic branching.
x-doc.title_zh: 错误的符号化状态字符串,便于程序按状态分支处理。

x-doc.desc_en: The error payload returned when generation fails, carrying a code, a human-readable message, and a symbolic status.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成失败时返回的错误载荷,携带错误码、可读消息与符号化状态。
